'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 74''' was the seventy-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 28]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Creation of the First Death Star]]
*[[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]
*[[Lowbacca]]
*[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's Home]]
*[[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|IG Banking Clan Droid]]
*[[Sonic weapon/Legends|Sonic Weaponry]]
*[[Mountain Terrain Armored Transport]] (MT-AT)
